fields.name: id
fields.comment: url_hash — the document key. mergeOrUpload uses this for idempotent upserts.

fields.name: url
fields.comment: Original article URL. Stored for retrieval, not searched — full text lives in ADLS.

fields.name: title
fields.comment: Article title. en.microsoft handles stemming, stop words, contractions better than standard Lucene.

fields.name: body_snippet
fields.comment: First 500 chars of article content. Full body stays in ADLS — Search is not a blob store.

fields.name: source
fields.comment: News source name (e.g. BBC, Reuters). Facetable for source-based drill-down.

fields.name: category
fields.comment: NewsAPI category: technology | business | science | health. Primary filter + facet.

fields.name: published_at
fields.comment: Article publish timestamp. Sortable for recency ranking. Filterable for date range queries.

fields.name: sentiment_label
fields.comment: positive | negative | neutral | mixed. Facetable for sentiment-based filtering.

fields.name: sentiment_score
fields.comment: Confidence score for the positive sentiment label (0.0–1.0). Sortable for sentiment ranking.

fields.name: entities
fields.comment: Flattened entity text strings (e.g. ['Apple', 'Tim Cook', 'Cupertino']). Searchable + filterable for entity-targeted queries.

fields.name: key_phrases
fields.comment: Key phrases extracted by Language API. Searchable — boosts keyword recall for domain terms.

fields.name: content_vector
fields.comment: text-embedding-ada-002 vector (1536 dims). retrievable=false — vectors are large, we never return them to clients. HNSW cosine similarity.

algorithms.name: hnsw-config
algorithms.comment: m=4: connections per node. Lower = smaller index, faster build, slightly lower recall. efConstruction=400: build-time quality. efSearch=500: query-time recall vs speed tradeoff. Both tunable post-deploy.

configurations.name: semantic-config
configurations.comment: Semantic ranker re-scores top-50 BM25+vector results using a cross-encoder language model. title weighted highest, then body_snippet, then key_phrases and entities as keyword context.

functions.comment: Articles published in the last 7 days get up to 2x boost, decaying logarithmically.
